__warnings.note: Phase names are pedagogical metaphors. Reviewer free to suggest more natural Shona equivalents — e.g. 'Hook' as 'Chiroto' (dream/hook) vs 'Mavambo' (beginning).
Already uses 'TSIKA' in en. Kept verbatim — it's a Shona word, just uppercased for emphasis.
'Let's learn' → 'Ngatidzidze'. Reviewer: confirm the conjugation reads as inclusive (us-together) not 'I'.
'Famba zvakanaka →' is already the Shona signoff (means 'Go well'). Stays Shona in both locales.
'✓ Correct!' → '✓ Zvakanaka!'. Could also be 'Chokwadi!' — pick the one that feels most encouraging.
'Type your answer' — used 'Nyora mhinduro yako'. Idiomatic.
'Tap words below to build the sentence' — long instruction. Translation conveys the same meaning.

Course-hub category labels. 'Mitauro' (languages), 'Zvidzidzo zveAI' (AI courses — literally 'lessons of AI'), 'Ziva Iwe Pachako' (Know Yourself — literally 'know you yourself'). Reviewer: confirm these read as category names not action prompts.

'+ Tenga rimwe chidzidzo chemutauro' = '+ buy another language course'. Reviewer: check the 'rimwe' vs 'chimwe' agreement is right for chidzidzo (class 7 — should be 'chimwe'). Adjust 'language_course' if so.
Coming-soon copy for AI courses + Know Yourself categories. 'Tichakuzivisai' = 'we will let you know'. Reviewer: confirm tone matches the playful chameleon brand.

tab.coming_soon_sub: Tiri kuvaka zvidzidzo zvino. Dzoka munguva pfupi!

buy.know_yourself_course: + Tenga chimwe chidzidzo che Ziva Iwe Pachako

empty_category.ai_courses_body: Chidzidzo chekutanga chichatangwa munguva pfupi. Tichakuzivisai kana chazogadzirira.
empty_category.know_yourself_body: Chidzidzo chekutanga chichatangwa munguva pfupi. Tichakuzivisai kana chazogadzirira.

locked.subscription_body: Mamoduru 5-10 ndere chikamu cheText AI tier nepamusoro. Wedzera kuti uenderere mberi naRwen.
locked.course_body: Chidzidzo ichi ndecherudzi rwausati wavhura. Wedzera rudzi paaccount yako kuti utange.

quit.title: Buda muchidzidzo?
quit.body: Kufambira kwako muchidzidzo chino kucharasika. Une chokwadi here?

phase8.unlocked_body: Edza '{{topic}}' muhurukuro. Rwen achashandisa zvawapfuura kudzidza.
phase8.locked_body: Ita hurukuro yemaminitsi 2 nezve '{{topic}}'. Rwen achashandisa zvawapfuura kudzidza.

build_sentence.placeholder: Dzvanya mashoko ari pasi kuti uvake mutsetse
